get.description: Checks the eligibility for a given property postcode, and returns a payload with an eligibility status.

parameters.description: Property postcode to check eligibility for
parameters.name: postcode

parameters.description: Legislative country for property, (for use with cross border postcodes)
parameters.name: legislativeCountry

Eligible postcode.description: Result for a match with an eligible postcode

Ineligible postcode.description: Result for a match with an ineligible postcode

Multiple matches found for postcode.description: Multiple matches found in the DB for the provided postcode.

No match found for postcode.description: No match found in the DB for the provided postcode.

Postcode that is cross-border.description: Result for a match with a cross border postcode, that needs the legistalative country to be specified as well

400.description: Missing or blank postcode query parameter

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authorization token

403.description: Forbidden - Invalid or missing service authorization token
